info.description: Expense splitting and group finance management backend.
info.title: PRISM API

post.description: Validates credentials and returns user + token.
Creates Firebase account + DB user in one call. Returns user and token.

409.description: email or username already in use

post.description: Verifies Firebase ID token from client SDK. Creates DB user if first time.
Exchanges email and password for a Firebase ID token. Use the returned idToken as the Bearer token for all protected endpoints.
Creates a new expense-splitting group. The caller is automatically added as admin.

get.description: Returns a single group by UUID.

put.description: Updates mutable fields on a group. Only group admins can perform this action.

delete.description: Soft-deletes a group (is_active = false). Only group admins can perform this action.

get.description: Returns the net balance for each member in the group.

post.description: Removes the authenticated user from the group. Admins must transfer ownership before leaving.

422.description: admin cannot leave without transferring ownership

get.description: Returns all current members of the specified group.

post.description: Adds a user to the specified group with a given role (admin or member). Only group admins can add members.
post.summary: Add a member to a group

delete.description: Removes the specified member from the group. Only group admins can remove members.
delete.summary: Remove a member from a group

get.description: Returns all transactions belonging to the specified group.
Returns the profile of the authenticated user.

get.summary: Get personal spending summary by category

post.description: Records a new expense in a group with participant splits. The paid_by field must match the authenticated user.

get.description: Returns a single transaction by UUID.

put.description: Updates mutable fields on a transaction. Only the user who paid can update it.

403.description: forbidden — only the payer can update

delete.description: Soft-deletes a transaction (status = deleted). Only the user who paid can delete it.

403.description: forbidden — only the payer can delete

post.description: Creates a user record directly. For public registration use POST /auth/signup instead.

get.description: Returns all groups the authenticated user is a member of.

put.description: Updates the authenticated user's own profile. ID is extracted from the Bearer token — no need to pass it in the URL.

delete.description: Soft-deletes the authenticated user's own account (is_deleted = true). ID is extracted from the Bearer token.

get.description: Returns a single user by UUID.
Returns all transactions where the specified user is the payer.

id_token.description: Firebase ID token from client SDK
